problem: Design and validate Rebecca Energy color palette for Human Design chart visualization with semantic mappings, accessibility compliance, and cozy autumnal forest aesthetic
goal: Produce production-ready COLOR_PALETTE_rebecca_energy.json at ontology/COLOR_PALETTE_rebecca_energy.json with complete hex codes, semantic mappings, functional colors, usage examples, and WCAG AA accessibility validation

rebecca_energy_philosophy.aesthetic: Cozy autumnal forest, twilight magic, whimsical yet grounded
rebecca_energy_philosophy.tone: Warm and approachable, playful metaphors, treasure map for 7-year journey

functional_requirements.accessibility: WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for UI components)

design_constraints.format: JSON with hex codes, RGB values, semantic keys
design_constraints.structure: Primary palette, functional colors, semantic mappings, usage rules
design_constraints.validation: All color pairs tested for WCAG AA compliance
design_constraints.examples: CSS classes, usage patterns, do/don't guidelines

constraints: Work in strand fork space (automatic isolation branch)
WCAG AA compliance for all text/background combinations
Embody Rebecca Energy philosophy (cozy autumnal forest aesthetic)
Support both light and dark mode color schemes
JSON format suitable for programmatic access
Validate contrast ratios with accessibility tools
success_criteria: Primary palette: mystical purple, autumn gold, forest green, earth brown (hex codes)
Semantic color mappings for HD concepts (conscious/unconscious, defined/undefined)
Functional colors for UI states (hover, active, disabled, focus)
All color combinations pass WCAG AA contrast tests
Usage examples: CSS classes, component patterns

1_palette_design.description: Design primary color palette with Rebecca Energy aesthetic

tasks.task: Design primary color palette embodying 'cozy autumnal forest, twilight magic' aesthetic. Define: mystical purples (consciousness, twilight), autumn gold/amber (activation, warmth), forest greens (grounded, growth), earth browns (stability). Create light and dark mode variants. Generate hex codes, RGB, HSL values.

2_semantic_mapping.description: Map colors to Human Design semantic concepts

tasks.task: Design semantic color mappings for HD concepts: conscious (gold) vs unconscious (purple), defined (saturated) vs undefined (muted), active channels (green), electromagnetic connections (amber), transits (twilight purple). Include interaction chart colors (person A, person B, composite).

3_functional_colors.description: Define functional UI colors for interactive states

tasks.task: Design functional color system: backgrounds (light/dark), text (primary/secondary/muted), borders, hover states, active/selected states, disabled states, focus indicators. Ensure consistency with primary palette and Rebecca Energy aesthetic.

4_accessibility_validation.description: Validate all color combinations for WCAG AA compliance

tasks.task: Validate ALL color combinations for WCAG AA contrast ratios: text on backgrounds (4.5:1), UI components (3:1). Test light and dark modes. Document passing/failing combinations. Suggest adjustments for failing combinations while maintaining Rebecca Energy aesthetic.

5_synthesis.description: Synthesize complete color palette JSON with usage guide

tasks.task: Synthesize ontology/COLOR_PALETTE_rebecca_energy.json with: primary palette, semantic mappings, functional colors, accessibility notes, usage examples (CSS classes), design rationale. Create JSON schema for validation. Generate docs/COLOR_PALETTE_USAGE.md with guidelines and do/don't examples.

accessibility: WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast for text on backgrounds
WCAG AA 3:1 contrast for UI components
Both light and dark modes compliant

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
